==Biography==
===2015 Season===
After the conclusion of the spring season, DaDa7 moved from OMG to [[Team WE]] and renamed to '''SunnGoo'''.<ref>[http://www.thescoreesports.com/lol/news/1742 DaDa7 transferred to Team WE] ''thescoreesports.com''</ref> August, SunnGoo announced he is a free agent and left Team WE.

== Trivia ==
* Known as a famous Dungeon & Fighter (DNF) player and got 1st place at WCG 2009 AMD China National Cup.
